creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Dietmar,

there hasn't been any update on the PR you sent (see [1]) for quite a
while. Does the problem with devel/strace you have described still occur
with an up-to-date system and ports tree? Do you have procfs mounted as
noted in the port's description?

The devel/strace port does not have an active maintainer, and since it is
only for i386 systems, I cannot test it myself. The port is at version
4.5.18, the latest release seems to be 4.7. Maybe updating the port to the
most recent version of the software helps?

Please let me know if the problem still exists or if this PR should be
closed.

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161578
